'''Altratonne''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Altratonne system/Legends|Altratonne system]], orbiting the star [[Altratonne Prime]].

==History==
Originally known as '''Kveror''', the planet was absorbed into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]] as [[Xim/Legends|he]] expanded his borders from the ancient [[Kingdom of Cron]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] saw the construction of a primary Imperial [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] relay communications base called [[Altratonne Station]] on the planet's surface as a means to communicate with this region of the Rim. Because the planet was regularly showered with solar flares from the star, communications were often times disrupted. It wasn't long into the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] that the station on the planet was targeted by agents of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and a strike team led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Lav Bilsek]] set out to destroy it. Fleeing the doomed facility, the Imperial agents monitoring communications were able to evacuate before the station was destroyed.<ref name="MBC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Altratonne was created for the ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles Companion]]'', published in [[1994]].<ref name="MBC" /> It was later charted on a map of [[Xim's empire]] in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.<ref name="TEA" />
